creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2009-12-25 19:26:55 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    www/p5-WWW-Shorten-NotLong Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                               pkg-plist 
  Log:
  A Perl interface to the web site notlong.com. Notlong.com simply
  maintains a database of long URLs, each of which has a unique
  identifier.
  
  WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/WWW-Shorten-NotLong/
  
  PR:             ports/140856
  Submitted by:   Sahil Tandon <sahil at tandon.net>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2506    +1 -0      ports/www/Makefile
  1.1       +26 -0     ports/www/p5-WWW-Shorten-NotLong/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/www/p5-WWW-Shorten-NotLong/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/www/p5-WWW-Shorten-NotLong/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/www/p5-WWW-Shorten-NotLong/pkg-plist (new)
